SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.device

Class LightSensor

java.lang.Object
edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.LightSensor
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEdgeDevice
public class LightSensor extends InputDevice
Represents an ambient light sensor edge device.

When the sensor takes a reading, it calls onLightLevelChanged(int), which publishes a "LIGHT_LEVEL_CHANGED" event to the EVENT topic. The light level reading (in lux) is included as metadata so automation rules can be built around thresholds (e.g., "if light drops below 100 lux, turn on the lamp").

Threshold logic is intentionally left to the Automation Hub and rule definitions rather than being hardcoded in the sensor itself.

    static final String

  • Constructor Details

    • LightSensor

      public LightSensor(String deviceId, String name)
      Constructs a LightSensor.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the unique ID for this sensor
      name - the human-readable name (e.g., "Living Room Light Sensor")

  • Method Details

    • getDeviceType

      public DeviceType getDeviceType()
      Returns the DeviceType for this specific input device. Implemented by each concrete subclass.
      Specified by:
      getDeviceType in class InputDevice
      Returns:
      DeviceType.LIGHT_SENSOR

    • onLightLevelChanged

      public void onLightLevelChanged(int lux)
      Called by the device firmware when a new ambient light reading is taken. Publishes a "LIGHT_LEVEL_CHANGED" event with the lux value as metadata.
      Parameters:
      lux - the ambient light level reading in lux; must be >= 0
